action.reasoning: Observation: FP+MLP baseline at ~0.163 AP (val~0.177 in past); latest run regressed to 0.136 due to incomplete/truncated train.py (loop cut off), large 2048-dim 4-layer model, and suboptimal convergence (val AP stuck ~0.14). PyG still segfaults. Analysis: Truncation + model capacity caused poor training; masked BCE, pos_weights, and ReduceLROnPlateau are correct but need full robust implementation with per-epoch jsonl logging, smaller stable model (hidden=512, 3 layers, low dropout), grad_clip, full epochs, and best checkpoint on val AP. This should recover >0.16 and push higher. Decision: Update model.py (smaller arch for stability), fully rewrite complete train.py (no truncation, metrics.jsonl per epoch with loss/val_ap/lr, masked loss, scheduler.step(val_ap), 50 epochs), keep predict.py (compatible). Train then submit_eval on best.pt for improved avg_precision.
